headline: Johnson Controls International (NYSE:JCI) Technical Breakout Setup Scores Perfect 10 Rating
summary: Technical breakout scanning identifies stocks with strong uptrends and price consolidation. Johnson Controls (JCI) scores a perfect 10/10 Technical Rating with an 8/10 Setup Quality, offering a favorable risk/reward breakout opportunity near resistance.
